query.description: Buses and their base voltages.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?name ?mRID ?BaseVoltage_nominalVoltage WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s c:ConnectivityNode.ConnectivityNodeContainer ?sys. ?s r:type c:ConnectivityNode. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. { ?ce c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConductingEquipment ?ce. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConnectivityNode ?s. ?ce c:ConductingEquipment.BaseVoltage ?bv. } UNION { ?pxf c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?end c:PowerTransformerEnd.PowerTransformer ?pxf. ?end c:TransformerEnd.Terminal ?t3. ?t3 c:Terminal.ConnectivityNode ?s. ?end c:TransformerEnd.BaseVoltage ?bv. } ?bv c:BaseVoltage.nominalVoltage ?BaseVoltage_nominalVoltage. } ORDER by ?name

query.description: XY bus coordinates for graphical layouts.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?name ?mRID ?text ?ConnectivityNode_mRID ?sequenceNumber ?xPosition ?yPosition WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s c:ConnectivityNode.ConnectivityNodeContainer ?sys. ?s r:type c:ConnectivityNode. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?ConnectivityNode_mRID. ?tdo c:DiagramObject.IdentifiedObject ?s. ?tdo c:TextDiagramObject.text ?text. ?tdo c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?tdo c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?pt c:DiagramObjectPoint.DiagramObject ?tdo. ?pt c:DiagramObjectPoint.sequenceNumber ?sequenceNumber. ?pt c:DiagramObjectPoint.xPosition ?xPosition. ?pt c:DiagramObjectPoint.yPosition ?yPosition. } ORDER by ?name ?sequenceNumber

query.description: A *SynchronousMachine* with dynamic parameters. The *GeneratingUnit_type* is typically *HydroGeneratingUnit*, *NuclearGeneratingUnit*, or *ThermalGeneratingUnit*.
query.value: # EMTSyncMachine SELECT ?name ?GeneratingUnit_type ?ConnectivityNode1_name ?ratedS ?ratedU ?p ?q ?maxOperatingP ?minOperatingP ?maxQ ?minQ ?inertia ?xDirectSync ?xDirectTrans ?xDirectSubtrans ?xQuadSync ?xQuadTrans ?xQuadSubtrans ?statorResistance ?statorLeakageReactance ?tpdo ?tppdo ?tpqo ?tppqo ?mRID ?GeneratingUnit_mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s r:type c:SynchronousMachine. ?s c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:RotatingMachine.ratedS ?ratedS. ?s c:RotatingMachine.ratedU ?ratedU. ?s c:RotatingMachine.p ?p. ?s c:RotatingMachine.q ?q. ?s c:RotatingMachine.GeneratingUnit ?unit. ?unit c:GeneratingUnit.maxOperatingP ?maxOperatingP. ?unit c:GeneratingUnit.minOperatingP ?minOperatingP. ?unit c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?GeneratingUnit_mRID. {?unit a ?rawtype. bind(strafter(str(?rawtype),"#") as ?postfix) bind(strbefore(str(?postfix),"GeneratingUnit") as ?GeneratingUnit_type)} ?s c:SynchronousMachine.maxQ ?maxQ. ?s c:SynchronousMachine.minQ ?minQ. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineDynamics.SynchronousMachine ?s. ?dyn c:RotatingMachineDynamics.inertia ?inertia. ?dyn c:RotatingMachineDynamics.statorResistance ?statorResistance. ?dyn c:RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance ?statorLeakageReactance. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSync ?xDirectSync. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectTrans ?xDirectTrans. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans ?xDirectSubtrans. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSync ?xQuadSync. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadTrans ?xQuadTrans. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans ?xQuadSubtrans. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tpdo ?tpdo. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppdo ?tppdo. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tpqo ?tpqo. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppqo ?tppqo. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConductingEquipment ?s. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConnectivityNode ?cn1. ?t1 c:ACDCTerminal.sequenceNumber "1"^^c:Integer. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.name ?ConnectivityNode1_name } ORDER by ?name

query.description: A three-phase transposed line, overhead or underground.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?mRID ?BaseVoltage_nominalVoltage ?ConnectivityNode1_name ?ConnectivityNode2_name ?length ?r ?x ?bch ?r0 ?x0 ?b0ch ?EquipmentContainer_mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID ?ConnectivityNode2_mRID WHERE { ?s r:type c:ACLineSegment. ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:ConductingEquipment.BaseVoltage ?bv. ?bv c:BaseVoltage.nominalVoltage ?BaseVoltage_nominalVoltage. ?s c:Conductor.length ?length. ?s c:ACLineSegment.r ?r. ?s c:ACLineSegment.x ?x. ?s c:ACLineSegment.bch ?bch. ?s c:ACLineSegment.r0 ?r0. ?s c:ACLineSegment.x0 ?x0. ?s c:ACLineSegment.b0ch ?b0ch. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConductingEquipment ?s. ?t1 c:ACDCTerminal.sequenceNumber "1"^^c:Integer. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConnectivityNode ?cn1. ?t2 c:Terminal.ConductingEquipment ?s. ?t2 c:ACDCTerminal.sequenceNumber "2"^^c:Integer. ?t2 c:Terminal.ConnectivityNode ?cn2. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.name ?ConnectivityNode1_name. ?cn2 c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?ConnectivityNode2_mRID. ?cn2 c:IdentifiedObject.name ?ConnectivityNode2_name } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: A three-phase breaker with disconnect switches.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?ConnectivityNode1_name ?ConnectivityNode2_name ?BaseVoltage_nominalVoltage ?mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID ?ConnectivityNode2_mRID WHERE { ?s r:type c:DisconnectingCircuitBreaker. ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:ConductingEquipment.BaseVoltage ?bv. ?bv c:BaseVoltage.nominalVoltage ?BaseVoltage_nominalVoltage. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConductingEquipment ?s. ?t1 c:ACDCTerminal.sequenceNumber "1"^^c:Integer. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConnectivityNode ?cn1. ?t2 c:Terminal.ConductingEquipment ?s. ?t2 c:ACDCTerminal.sequenceNumber "2"^^c:Integer. ?t2 c:Terminal.ConnectivityNode ?cn2. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.name ?ConnectivityNode1_name. ?cn2 c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?ConnectivityNode2_mRID. ?cn2 c:IdentifiedObject.name ?ConnectivityNode2_name } ORDER by ?name

query.description: A Thevenin equivalent source.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_name ?BaseVoltage_nominalVoltage ?r ?x ?r0 ?x0 ?EnergySource_nominalVoltage ?voltageMagnitude ?voltageAngle ?EquipmentContainer_mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID WHERE { ?s r:type c:EnergySource. ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:ConductingEquipment.BaseVoltage ?bv. ?bv c:BaseVoltage.nominalVoltage ?BaseVoltage_nominalVoltage. ?s c:EnergySource.r ?r. ?s c:EnergySource.x ?x. ?s c:EnergySource.r0 ?r0. ?s c:EnergySource.x0 ?x0. ?s c:EnergySource.nominalVoltage ?EnergySource_nominalVoltage. ?s c:EnergySource.voltageMagnitude ?voltageMagnitude. ?s c:EnergySource.voltageAngle ?voltageAngle. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConductingEquipment ?s. ?t1 c:ACDCTerminal.sequenceNumber "1"^^c:Integer. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConnectivityNode ?cn1. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.name ?ConnectivityNode1_name } ORDER by ?name

query.description: Series capacitor or reactor.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?ConnectivityNode1_name ?ConnectivityNode2_name ?BaseVoltage_nominalVoltage ?r ?r0 ?x ?x0 ?mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID ?ConnectivityNode2_mRID WHERE { ?s r:type c:SeriesCompensator. ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:ConductingEquipment.BaseVoltage ?bv. ?bv c:BaseVoltage.nominalVoltage ?BaseVoltage_nominalVoltage. ?s c:SeriesCompensator.r ?r. ?s c:SeriesCompensator.r0 ?r0. ?s c:SeriesCompensator.x ?x. ?s c:SeriesCompensator.x0 ?x0. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConductingEquipment ?s. ?t1 c:ACDCTerminal.sequenceNumber "1"^^c:Integer. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConnectivityNode ?cn1. ?t2 c:Terminal.ConductingEquipment ?s. ?t2 c:ACDCTerminal.sequenceNumber "2"^^c:Integer. ?t2 c:Terminal.ConnectivityNode ?cn2. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.name ?ConnectivityNode1_name. ?cn2 c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?ConnectivityNode2_mRID. ?cn2 c:IdentifiedObject.name ?ConnectivityNode2_name } ORDER by ?name

query.description: Three-phase, balanced, multi-winding power transformers defined by data for windings, mesh impedances, and core admittance. The datasheet option is not supported in this query. The query returns one row for each winding of a transformer.
query.value: SELECT ?mRID ?PowerTransformer_name ?vectorGroup ?endNumber ?ConnectivityNode1_name ?BaseVoltage_nominalVoltage ?connectionKind ?ratedS ?ratedU ?phaseAngleClock ?grounded ?rground ?xground ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID ?PowerTransformer_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?p c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?p r:type c:PowerTransformer. ?p c:IdentifiedObject.name ?PowerTransformer_name. ?p c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerTransformer_mRID. ?p c:PowerTransformer.vectorGroup ?vectorGroup. ?end c:PowerTransformerEnd.PowerTransformer ?p. ?end c:TransformerEnd.endNumber ?endNumber. ?end c:PowerTransformerEnd.ratedS ?ratedS. ?end c:PowerTransformerEnd.ratedU ?ratedU. ?end c:PowerTransformerEnd.phaseAngleClock ?phaseAngleClock. ?end c:PowerTransformerEnd.connectionKind ?connraw. bind(strafter(str(?connraw),"WindingConnection.") as ?connectionKind) ?end c:TransformerEnd.grounded ?grounded. OPTIONAL {?end c:TransformerEnd.rground ?rground.} OPTIONAL {?end c:TransformerEnd.xground ?xground.} ?end c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?end c:TransformerEnd.Terminal ?t1. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConnectivityNode ?cn1. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.name ?ConnectivityNode1_name. ?end c:TransformerEnd.BaseVoltage ?bv. ?bv c:BaseVoltage.nominalVoltage ?BaseVoltage_nominalVoltage } ORDER BY ?PowerTransformer_name ?endNumber

query.description: Linear exciting current branch for a transformer.
query.value: SELECT ?PowerTransformer_name ?endNumber ?b ?g ?mRID ?PowerTransformerEnd_mRID ?PowerTransformer_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?p c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?p r:type c:PowerTransformer. ?p c:IdentifiedObject.name ?PowerTransformer_name. ?end c:PowerTransformerEnd.PowerTransformer ?p. ?adm c:TransformerCoreAdmittance.TransformerEnd ?end. ?end c:TransformerEnd.endNumber ?endNumber. ?adm c:TransformerCoreAdmittance.b ?b. ?adm c:TransformerCoreAdmittance.g ?g. ?p c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerTransformer_mRID. ?end c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerTransformerEnd_mRID. ?adm c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. } ORDER BY ?PowerTransformer_name

query.description: Off-nominal transformer tap in percent. The query returns one row for each winding that has an off-nominal tap.
query.value: SELECT ?PowerTransformer_name ?endNumber ?stepVoltageIncrement ?step ?PowerTransformerEnd_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?p c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?p c:IdentifiedObject.name ?PowerTransformer_name. ?rtc r:type c:RatioTapChanger. ?rtc c:RatioTapChanger.TransformerEnd ?end. ?end c:PowerTransformerEnd.PowerTransformer ?p. ?end c:TransformerEnd.endNumber ?endNumber. ?rtc c:RatioTapChanger.stepVoltageIncrement ?stepVoltageIncrement. ?rtc c:TapChanger.step ?step. ?end c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerTransformerEnd_mRID. } ORDER BY ?PowerTransformer_name ?endNumber

query.description: Mesh impedances between pairs of transformer windings. Note that SI units are used, referred to the highest voltage winding in the pair.
query.value: SELECT ?PowerTransformer_name ?FromTransformerEnd_endNumber ?ToTransformerEnd_endNumber ?r ?x ?PowerTransformer_mRID ?FromTransformerEnd_mRID ?ToTransformerEnd_mRID ?mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?p c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?p r:type c:PowerTransformer. ?p c:IdentifiedObject.name ?PowerTransformer_name. ?from c:PowerTransformerEnd.PowerTransformer ?p. ?imp c:TransformerMeshImpedance.FromTransformerEnd ?from. ?imp c:TransformerMeshImpedance.ToTransformerEnd ?to. ?imp c:TransformerMeshImpedance.r ?r. ?imp c:TransformerMeshImpedance.x ?x. ?from c:TransformerEnd.endNumber ?FromTransformerEnd_endNumber. ?to c:TransformerEnd.endNumber ?ToTransformerEnd_endNumber. ?p c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerTransformer_mRID. ?from c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?FromTransformerEnd_mRID. ?to c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?ToTransformerEnd_mRID. ?imp c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. } ORDER BY ?PowerTransformer_name ?FromTransformerEnd_endNumber ?ToTransformerEnd_endNumber

query.description: Non-linear transformer saturation data. Does not include hysteresis, so the resistive portion of *TransformerCoreAdmittance* should still be included, but this replaces the inductive portion of *TransformerCoreAdmittance*.
query.value: SELECT ?PowerTransformer_name ?PowerTransformer_mRID ?TransformerCoreAdmittance_mRID ?amps ?vs WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?p c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?p r:type c:PowerTransformer. ?p c:IdentifiedObject.name ?PowerTransformer_name. ?p c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerTransformer_mRID. ?end c:PowerTransformerEnd.PowerTransformer ?p. ?adm c:TransformerCoreAdmittance.TransformerEnd ?end. ?adm c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?TransformerCoreAdmittance_mRID. ?sat e:TransformerSaturationCurve.TransformerCoreAdmittance ?adm. ?crv c:CurveData.Curve ?sat. ?crv c:CurveData.xvalue ?xvalue. ?crv c:CurveData.y1value ?y1value. bind(xsd:string(?xvalue) as ?xstr) bind(xsd:float(?xstr) as ?amps) bind(xsd:string(?y1value) as ?ystr) bind(xsd:float(?ystr) as ?vs) } ORDER BY ?PowerTransformer_mRID ?amps ?vs

query.description: Lists all the transmission systems found in a CIM RDF file. The *mRID* can be used to filter on the system, when constructing a network model from a CIM RDF file that contains multiple transmission systems.
An inverter with associated solar generation. Keyed on the *PowerElectronicsConnection*.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?ConnectivityNode1_name ?ratedS ?ratedU ?maxP ?minP ?maxQ ?minQ ?maxIFault ?p ?q ?EquipmentContainer_mRID ?mRID ?PhotoVoltaicUnit_mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s r:type c:PhotoVoltaicUnit. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PhotoVoltaicUnit_mRID. ?s c:PowerElectronicsUnit.maxP ?maxP. ?s c:PowerElectronicsUnit.minP ?minP. ?s c:PowerElectronicsUnit.PowerElectronicsConnection ?pec. ?pec c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?pec c:PowerElectronicsConnection.ratedS ?ratedS. ?pec c:PowerElectronicsConnection.ratedU ?ratedU. ?pec c:PowerElectronicsConnection.maxIFault ?maxIFault. ?pec c:PowerElectronicsConnection.p ?p. ?pec c:PowerElectronicsConnection.q ?q. ?pec c:PowerElectronicsConnection.minQ ?minQ. ?pec c:PowerElectronicsConnection.maxQ ?maxQ. ?pec c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConductingEquipment ?pec. ?t1 c:ACDCTerminal.sequenceNumber "1"^^c:Integer. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConnectivityNode ?cn1. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.name ?ConnectivityNode1_name } ORDER by ?name

query.description: An inverter with associated wind generation. Keyed on the *PowerElectronicsConnection*.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?ConnectivityNode1_name ?ratedS ?ratedU ?maxP ?minP ?maxQ ?minQ ?maxIFault ?p ?q ?EquipmentContainer_mRID ?PowerElectronicsWindUnit_mRID ?mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s r:type c:PowerElectronicsWindUnit. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerElectronicsWindUnit_mRID. ?s c:PowerElectronicsUnit.maxP ?maxP. ?s c:PowerElectronicsUnit.minP ?minP. ?s c:PowerElectronicsUnit.PowerElectronicsConnection ?pec. ?pec c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?pec c:PowerElectronicsConnection.ratedS ?ratedS. ?pec c:PowerElectronicsConnection.ratedU ?ratedU. ?pec c:PowerElectronicsConnection.maxIFault ?maxIFault. ?pec c:PowerElectronicsConnection.p ?p. ?pec c:PowerElectronicsConnection.q ?q. ?pec c:PowerElectronicsConnection.minQ ?minQ. ?pec c:PowerElectronicsConnection.maxQ ?maxQ. ?pec c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConductingEquipment ?pec. ?t1 c:ACDCTerminal.sequenceNumber "1"^^c:Integer. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConnectivityNode ?cn1. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.name ?ConnectivityNode1_name } ORDER by ?name

query.description: A static excitation system. DEPRECATED.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?ilr ?ka ?kc ?kf ?klr ?ta ?tb ?tb1 ?tc ?tc1 ?tf ?vamax ?vamin ?vimax ?vimin ?vrmax ?vrmin ?xe ?mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s r:type c:ExcST1A. ?s c:ExcitationSystemDynamics.SynchronousMachineDynamics ?dyn. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineDynamics.SynchronousMachine ?eq. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID. ?s r:type c:ExcST1A. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:ExcST1A.ilr ?ilr. ?s c:ExcST1A.ka ?ka. ?s c:ExcST1A.kc ?kc. ?s c:ExcST1A.kf ?kf. ?s c:ExcST1A.klr ?klr. ?s c:ExcST1A.ta ?ta. ?s c:ExcST1A.tb ?tb. ?s c:ExcST1A.tb1 ?tb1. ?s c:ExcST1A.tc ?tc. ?s c:ExcST1A.tc1 ?tc1. ?s c:ExcST1A.tf ?tf. ?s c:ExcST1A.vamax ?vamax. ?s c:ExcST1A.vamin ?vamin. ?s c:ExcST1A.vimax ?vimax. ?s c:ExcST1A.vimin ?vimin. ?s c:ExcST1A.vrmax ?vrmax. ?s c:ExcST1A.vrmin ?vrmin. ?s c:ExcST1A.xe ?xe. } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: A steam governor. DEPRECATED.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?k1 ?k2 ?k3 ?pmin ?pmax ?t1 ?t2 ?t3 ?t4 ?t5 ?t6 ?mwbase ?mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s r:type c:GovSteamSGO. ?s c:TurbineGovernorDynamics.SynchronousMachineDynamics ?dyn. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineDynamics.SynchronousMachine ?eq. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID. ?s r:type c:GovSteamSGO. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:GovSteamSGO.k1 ?k1. ?s c:GovSteamSGO.k2 ?k2. ?s c:GovSteamSGO.k3 ?k3. ?s c:GovSteamSGO.pmin ?pmin. ?s c:GovSteamSGO.pmax ?pmax. ?s c:GovSteamSGO.t1 ?t1. ?s c:GovSteamSGO.t2 ?t2. ?s c:GovSteamSGO.t3 ?t3. ?s c:GovSteamSGO.t4 ?t4. ?s c:GovSteamSGO.t5 ?t5. ?s c:GovSteamSGO.t6 ?t6. ?s c:GovSteamSGO.mwbase ?mwbase. } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: A power system stabilizer for synchronous machines. DEPRECATED.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?a1 ?a2 ?inputSignalType ?ks ?t1 ?t2 ?t3 ?t4 ?t5 ?t6 ?vrmax ?vrmin ?mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s r:type c:PssIEEE1A. ?s c:PowerSystemStabilizerDynamics.ExcitationSystemDynamics ?exc. ?exc c:ExcitationSystemDynamics.SynchronousMachineDynamics ?dyn. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineDynamics.SynchronousMachine ?eq. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID. ?s r:type c:PssIEEE1A. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:PssIEEE1A.a1 ?a1. ?s c:PssIEEE1A.a2 ?a2. ?s c:PssIEEE1A.inputSignalType ?inputSignalRaw. bind(strafter(str(?inputSignalRaw),"InputSignalKind.") as ?inputSignalType) ?s c:PssIEEE1A.ks ?ks. ?s c:PssIEEE1A.t1 ?t1. ?s c:PssIEEE1A.t2 ?t2. ?s c:PssIEEE1A.t3 ?t3. ?s c:PssIEEE1A.t4 ?t4. ?s c:PssIEEE1A.t5 ?t5. ?s c:PssIEEE1A.t6 ?t6. ?s c:PssIEEE1A.vrmax ?vrmax. ?s c:PssIEEE1A.vrmin ?vrmin. } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: A WECC current-source model for renewable energy generation. DEPRECATED.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?brkpt ?iolim ?iqrmax ?iqrmin ?ivpl1 ?ivplsw ?ivpnt0 ?ivpnt1 ?khv ?rrpwr ?tfltr ?tg ?volim ?zerox ?mRID ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s r:type c:WeccREGCA. ?s c:WeccDynamics.PowerElectronicsConnection ?eq. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID. ?s r:type c:WeccREGCA. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:WeccREGCA.brkpt ?brkpt. ?s c:WeccREGCA.iolim ?iolim. ?s c:WeccREGCA.iqrmax ?iqrmax. ?s c:WeccREGCA.iqrmin ?iqrmin. ?s c:WeccREGCA.ivpl1 ?ivpl1. ?s c:WeccREGCA.ivplsw ?ivplsw. ?s c:WeccREGCA.ivpnt0 ?ivpnt0. ?s c:WeccREGCA.ivpnt1 ?ivpnt1. ?s c:WeccREGCA.khv ?khv. ?s c:WeccREGCA.rrpwr ?rrpwr. ?s c:WeccREGCA.tfltr ?tfltr. ?s c:WeccREGCA.tg ?tg. ?s c:WeccREGCA.volim ?volim. ?s c:WeccREGCA.zerox ?zerox. } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: A WECC inverter controller for renewable energy generation. DEPRECATED.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?db1 ?db2 ?dPmax ?dPmin ?imax ?iqfrz ?iqh1 ?iql1 ?kqi ?kqp ?kqv ?kvi ?kvp ?pfFlag ?pFlag ?pmax ?pmin ?pqFlag ?qFlag ?qmax ?qmin ?thld ?thld2 ?tiq ?tp ?tpord ?trv ?vdi1i1 ?vdi1i2 ?vdi1i3 ?vdi1i4 ?vdi1v1 ?vdi1v2 ?vdi1v3 ?vdi1v4 ?vdi2i1 ?vdi2i2 ?vdi2i3 ?vdi2i4 ?vdi2v1 ?vdi2v2 ?vdi2v3 ?vdi2v4 ?vdip ?vFlag ?vmax ?vmin ?vref0 ?vref1 ?vup ?mRID ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s r:type c:WeccREECA. ?s c:WeccDynamics.PowerElectronicsConnection ?eq. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID. ?s r:type c:WeccREECA. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:WeccREECA.db1 ?db1. ?s c:WeccREECA.db2 ?db2. ?s c:WeccREECA.dPmax ?dPmax. ?s c:WeccREECA.dPmin ?dPmin. ?s c:WeccREECA.imax ?imax. ?s c:WeccREECA.iqfrz ?iqfrz. ?s c:WeccREECA.iqh1 ?iqh1. ?s c:WeccREECA.iql1 ?iql1. ?s c:WeccREECA.kqi ?kqi. ?s c:WeccREECA.kqp ?kqp. ?s c:WeccREECA.kqv ?kqv. ?s c:WeccREECA.kvi ?kvi. ?s c:WeccREECA.kvp ?kvp. ?s c:WeccREECA.pfFlag ?pfFlag. ?s c:WeccREECA.pFlag ?pFlag. ?s c:WeccREECA.pmax ?pmax. ?s c:WeccREECA.pmin ?pmin. ?s c:WeccREECA.pqFlag ?pqFlag. ?s c:WeccREECA.qFlag ?qFlag. ?s c:WeccREECA.qmax ?qmax. ?s c:WeccREECA.qmin ?qmin. ?s c:WeccREECA.thld ?thld. ?s c:WeccREECA.thld2 ?thld2. ?s c:WeccREECA.tiq ?tiq. ?s c:WeccREECA.tp ?tp. ?s c:WeccREECA.tpord ?tpord. ?s c:WeccREECA.trv ?trv. ?s c:WeccREECA.vdi1i1 ?vdi1i1. ?s c:WeccREECA.vdi1i2 ?vdi1i2. ?s c:WeccREECA.vdi1i3 ?vdi1i3. ?s c:WeccREECA.vdi1i4 ?vdi1i4. ?s c:WeccREECA.vdi1v1 ?vdi1v1. ?s c:WeccREECA.vdi1v2 ?vdi1v2. ?s c:WeccREECA.vdi1v3 ?vdi1v3. ?s c:WeccREECA.vdi1v4 ?vdi1v4. ?s c:WeccREECA.vdi2i1 ?vdi2i1. ?s c:WeccREECA.vdi2i2 ?vdi2i2. ?s c:WeccREECA.vdi2i3 ?vdi2i3. ?s c:WeccREECA.vdi2i4 ?vdi2i4. ?s c:WeccREECA.vdi2v1 ?vdi2v1. ?s c:WeccREECA.vdi2v2 ?vdi2v2. ?s c:WeccREECA.vdi2v3 ?vdi2v3. ?s c:WeccREECA.vdi2v4 ?vdi2v4. ?s c:WeccREECA.vdip ?vdip. ?s c:WeccREECA.vFlag ?vFlag. ?s c:WeccREECA.vmax ?vmax. ?s c:WeccREECA.vmin ?vmin. ?s c:WeccREECA.vref0 ?vref0. ?s c:WeccREECA.vref1 ?vref1. ?s c:WeccREECA.vup ?vup. } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: A WECC plant controller for renewable energy generation. DEPRECATED.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?db ?ddn ?dup ?emax ?emin ?fdbd1 ?fdbd2 ?femax ?femin ?frqFlag ?kc ?ki ?kig ?kp ?kpg ?pmax ?pmin ?qmax ?qmin ?rc ?refFlag ?tfltr ?tft ?tfv ?tlag ?tp ?vcmpFlag ?vfrz ?xc ?mRID ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s r:type c:WeccREPCA. ?s c:WeccDynamics.PowerElectronicsConnection ?eq. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID. ?s r:type c:WeccREPCA. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:WeccREPCA.db ?db. ?s c:WeccREPCA.ddn ?ddn. ?s c:WeccREPCA.dup ?dup. ?s c:WeccREPCA.emax ?emax. ?s c:WeccREPCA.emin ?emin. ?s c:WeccREPCA.fdbd1 ?fdbd1. ?s c:WeccREPCA.fdbd2 ?fdbd2. ?s c:WeccREPCA.femax ?femax. ?s c:WeccREPCA.femin ?femin. ?s c:WeccREPCA.frqFlag ?frqFlag. ?s c:WeccREPCA.kc ?kc. ?s c:WeccREPCA.ki ?ki. ?s c:WeccREPCA.kig ?kig. ?s c:WeccREPCA.kp ?kp. ?s c:WeccREPCA.kpg ?kpg. ?s c:WeccREPCA.pmax ?pmax. ?s c:WeccREPCA.pmin ?pmin. ?s c:WeccREPCA.qmax ?qmax. ?s c:WeccREPCA.qmin ?qmin. ?s c:WeccREPCA.rc ?rc. ?s c:WeccREPCA.refFlag ?refFlag. ?s c:WeccREPCA.tfltr ?tfltr. ?s c:WeccREPCA.tft ?tft. ?s c:WeccREPCA.tfv ?tfv. ?s c:WeccREPCA.tlag ?tlag. ?s c:WeccREPCA.tp ?tp. ?s c:WeccREPCA.vcmpFlag ?vcmpFlag. ?s c:WeccREPCA.vfrz ?vfrz. ?s c:WeccREPCA.xc ?xc. } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: A WECC drive-train model for wind generation. DEPRECATED.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?dshaft ?hg ?ht ?kshaft ?mRID ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s r:type c:WeccWTGTA. ?s c:WeccDynamics.PowerElectronicsConnection ?eq. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID. ?s r:type c:WeccWTGTA. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:WeccWTGTA.dshaft ?dshaft. ?s c:WeccWTGTA.hg ?hg. ?s c:WeccWTGTA.ht ?ht. ?s c:WeccWTGTA.kshaft ?kshaft. } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: A WECC aerodynamic model for wind generation. DEPRECATED.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?ka ?t0 ?mRID ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s r:type c:WeccWTGARA. ?s c:WeccDynamics.PowerElectronicsConnection ?eq. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID. ?s r:type c:WeccWTGARA. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:WeccWTGARA.ka ?ka. ?s c:WeccWTGARA.t0 ?t0. } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: List all (preferred) base voltages found in a transmission system.
Shunt reactor or capacitor.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?BaseVoltage_nominalVoltage ?nomU ?gPerSection ?bPerSection ?sections ?maximumSections ?ConnectivityNode1_name ?mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID WHERE { ?s r:type c:LinearShuntCompensator. ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:ConductingEquipment.BaseVoltage ?bv. ?bv c:BaseVoltage.nominalVoltage ?BaseVoltage_nominalVoltage. ?s c:ShuntCompensator.nomU ?nomU. ?s c:LinearShuntCompensator.gPerSection ?gPerSection. ?s c:LinearShuntCompensator.bPerSection ?bPerSection. ?s c:ShuntCompensator.sections ?sections. ?s c:ShuntCompensator.maximumSections ?maximumSections. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConductingEquipment ?s. ?t1 c:ACDCTerminal.sequenceNumber "1"^^c:Integer. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConnectivityNode ?cn1. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.name ?ConnectivityNode1_name } ORDER by ?name

query.description: Balanced three-phase ZIP load.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_name ?BaseVoltage_nominalVoltage ?p ?q ?pConstantImpedance ?qConstantImpedance ?pConstantCurrent ?qConstantCurrent ?pConstantPower ?qConstantPower ?pVoltageExponent ?qVoltageExponent ?EquipmentContainer_mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID WHERE { ?s r:type c:EnergyConsumer. ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:ConductingEquipment.BaseVoltage ?bv. ?bv c:BaseVoltage.nominalVoltage ?BaseVoltage_nominalVoltage. ?s c:EnergyConsumer.p ?p. ?s c:EnergyConsumer.q ?q. ?s c:EnergyConsumer.LoadResponse ?lr. ?lr c:LoadResponseCharacteristic.pConstantImpedance ?pConstantImpedance. ?lr c:LoadResponseCharacteristic.qConstantImpedance ?qConstantImpedance. ?lr c:LoadResponseCharacteristic.pConstantCurrent ?pConstantCurrent. ?lr c:LoadResponseCharacteristic.qConstantCurrent ?qConstantCurrent. ?lr c:LoadResponseCharacteristic.pConstantPower ?pConstantPower. ?lr c:LoadResponseCharacteristic.qConstantPower ?qConstantPower. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConductingEquipment ?s. ?t1 c:ACDCTerminal.sequenceNumber "1"^^c:Integer. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConnectivityNode ?cn1. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?ConnectivityNode1_mRID. ?cn1 c:IdentifiedObject.name ?ConnectivityNode1_name. OPTIONAL {?lr c:LoadResponseCharacteristic.pVoltageExponent ?pVoltageExponent.} OPTIONAL {?lr c:LoadResponseCharacteristic.qVoltageExponent ?qVoltageExponent.} } ORDER by ?name

query.description: Count the number of windings in each *PowerTransformer*.
query.value: SELECT ?mRID (count(?p) as ?count) WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?p c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?p r:type c:PowerTransformer. ?p c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?end c:PowerTransformerEnd.PowerTransformer ?p. } GROUP BY ?mRID ORDER BY ?mRID

query.description: Operational limits for transformer windings.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?mRID ?name ?PowerTransformerEnd_mRID ?OperationalLimitType_name ?value ?acceptableDuration ?isInfiniteDuration ?direction WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?p c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?end c:PowerTransformerEnd.PowerTransformer ?p. ?end c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerTransformerEnd_mRID. ?ols c:OperationalLimitSet.Terminal ?t1. ?end c:TransformerEnd.Terminal ?t1. ?s c:OperationalLimit.OperationalLimitSet ?ols. ?s c:OperationalLimit.OperationalLimitType ?olt. ?s r:type c:ApparentPowerLimit. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:ApparentPowerLimit.value ?valstr. bind(xsd:string(?valstr) as ?xsdstr) bind(xsd:float(?xsdstr) as ?value) ?olt c:IdentifiedObject.name ?OperationalLimitType_name. ?olt c:OperationalLimitType.isInfiniteDuration ?isInfiniteDuration. ?olt c:OperationalLimitType.direction ?rawdir. bind(strafter(str(?rawdir), "OperationalLimitDirectionKind.") as ?direction) OPTIONAL {?olt c:OperationalLimitType.acceptableDuration ?acceptableDuration.} } ORDER BY ?PowerTransformerEnd_mRID ?isInfiniteDuration ?OperationalLimitType_name ?value

query.description: Operational limits for conducting equipment. *Equipment_type* may be *ACLineSegment*, *DisconnectingCircuitBreaker*, etc. Use the *EMTXfmrLimit* query for transformer winding limits.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?mRID ?name ?Equipment_mRID ?Equipment_type ?OperationalLimitType_name ?value ?acceptableDuration ?isInfiniteDuration ?direction WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?Equipment_mRID. ?eq r:type ?typeraw. bind(strafter(str(?typeraw),"#") as ?Equipment_type) FILTER (?Equipment_type != "PowerTransformer") ?ols c:OperationalLimitSet.Terminal ?t1. ?t1 c:Terminal.ConductingEquipment ?eq. ?s c:OperationalLimit.OperationalLimitSet ?ols. ?s c:OperationalLimit.OperationalLimitType ?olt. ?s r:type c:ApparentPowerLimit. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:ApparentPowerLimit.value ?valstr. bind(xsd:string(?valstr) as ?xsdstr) bind(xsd:float(?xsdstr) as ?value) ?olt c:IdentifiedObject.name ?OperationalLimitType_name. ?olt c:OperationalLimitType.isInfiniteDuration ?isInfiniteDuration. ?olt c:OperationalLimitType.direction ?rawdir. bind(strafter(str(?rawdir), "OperationalLimitDirectionKind.") as ?direction) OPTIONAL {?olt c:OperationalLimitType.acceptableDuration ?acceptableDuration.} } ORDER BY ?Equipment_mRID ?isInfiniteDuration ?OperationalLimitType_name ?value

query.description: Bus voltages from power flow in a merged instance, keyed on *ConnectivityNode*.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?mRID ?name ?v ?angle WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s c:ConnectivityNode.TopologicalNode ?tn. ?s c:ConnectivityNode.ConnectivityNodeContainer ?sys. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?sv c:SvVoltage.TopologicalNode ?tn. ?sv c:SvVoltage.v ?v. ?sv c:SvVoltage.angle ?angle } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: Branch power flows in a merged instance, keyed on *Equipment*. *Equipment_type* may be *ACLineSegment*, *DisconnectingCircuitBreaker*, etc. Use the *EMTXfmrFlow* query for transformer winding flows.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?mRID ?sequenceNumber ?Equipment_type ?name ?p ?q WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s r:type ?typeraw. bind(strafter(str(?typeraw),"#") as ?Equipment_type) FILTER (?Equipment_type != "PowerTransformer") ?sv c:SvPowerFlow.Terminal ?t. ?t c:Terminal.ConductingEquipment ?s. ?t c:ACDCTerminal.sequenceNumber ?sequenceNumber. ?sv c:SvPowerFlow.p ?p. ?sv c:SvPowerFlow.q ?q } ORDER BY ?Equipment_type ?name

query.description: Transformer winding (end) power flows in a merged instance, keyed on *TransformerEnd*.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?mRID ?name ?PowerTransformer_mRID ?sequenceNumber ?endNumber ?p ?q WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?pxf c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?pxf c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerTransformer_mRID. ?end c:PowerTransformerEnd.PowerTransformer ?pxf. ?end c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?end c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?end c:TransformerEnd.Terminal ?trm. ?end c:TransformerEnd.endNumber ?endNumber. ?sv c:SvPowerFlow.Terminal ?trm. ?trm c:ACDCTerminal.sequenceNumber ?sequenceNumber. ?sv c:SvPowerFlow.p ?p. ?sv c:SvPowerFlow.q ?q } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: Bus voltages from power flow in a standalone file. Keyed on *ConnectivityNode*. Filtering on *EquipmentContainer* is not supported in standalone IC files.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?mRID ?v ?angle WHERE { ?sv c:SvVoltage.TopologicalNode ?tn. ?cn c:ConnectivityNode.TopologicalNode ?tn. bind(substr(str(?cn),strlen(str(?cn))-35) as ?mRID) ?sv c:SvVoltage.v ?v. ?sv c:SvVoltage.angle ?angle } ORDER BY ?mRID

query.description: Branch power flows in a standalone file. Don't select the system. Keyed on *Equipment*. Filtering on *EquipmentContainer* is not supported in standalone IC files. Includes PowerTransformers.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?mRID ?sequenceNumber ?p ?q WHERE { ?sv c:SvPowerFlow.Terminal ?trm. bind(substr(str(?trm),strlen(str(?trm))-37,36) as ?mRID) bind(substr(str(?trm),strlen(str(?trm))) as ?sequenceNumber) ?sv c:SvPowerFlow.p ?p. ?sv c:SvPowerFlow.q ?q } ORDER BY ?mRID ?sequenceNumber

query.description: Transformer winding (end) power flows in a standalone file. WARNING: no longer works with CIM Terminals in a standalone file; the IC and network model should be merged first. Don't select the system. Keyed on *TransformerEnd*. Filtering on *EquipmentContainer* is not supported in standalone IC files.

Collection of equipment comprising an inverter-based resource plant. May return multiple rows for the same plant *mRID*. Use the *EMTIBRPlantAttributes* query to retrieve the plant-level attributes. *Equipment_type* is typically *ACLineSegment*, *PowerTransformer*, *PowerElectronicsConnection*, or *DisconnectingCircuitBreaker* but may include other types.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?mRID ?name ?Equipment_mRID ?Equipment_type WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?p r:type e:IBRPlant. ?p c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?p c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?p e:ConnectedFacility.Equipments ?eq. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?Equipment_mRID. {?eq a ?rawtype. bind(strafter(str(?rawtype),"#") as ?Equipment_type)} } ORDER by ?mRID ?Equipment_type ?Equipment_mRID

query.description: Collection of equipment comprising a conventional generating plant. May return multiple rows for the same plant *mRID*. *Equipment_type* is typically *SynchronousMachine*, *PowerTransformer*, or *DisconnectingCircuitBreaker* but may include other types.
A DC exciter. DEPRECATED.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?efd1 ?efd2 ?exclim ?ka ?ke ?kf ?seefd1 ?seefd2 ?ta ?tb ?tc ?te ?tf ?uelin ?vrmax ?vrmin ?mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s r:type c:ExcIEEEDC1A. ?s c:ExcitationSystemDynamics.SynchronousMachineDynamics ?dyn. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineDynamics.SynchronousMachine ?eq. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID. ?s r:type c:ExcIEEEDC1A. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:ExcIEEEDC1A.efd1 ?efd1. ?s c:ExcIEEEDC1A.efd2 ?efd2. ?s c:ExcIEEEDC1A.exclim ?exclim. ?s c:ExcIEEEDC1A.ka ?ka. ?s c:ExcIEEEDC1A.ke ?ke. ?s c:ExcIEEEDC1A.kf ?kf. ?s c:ExcIEEEDC1A.seefd1 ?seefd1. ?s c:ExcIEEEDC1A.seefd2 ?seefd2. ?s c:ExcIEEEDC1A.ta ?ta. ?s c:ExcIEEEDC1A.tb ?tb. ?s c:ExcIEEEDC1A.tc ?tc. ?s c:ExcIEEEDC1A.te ?te. ?s c:ExcIEEEDC1A.tf ?tf. ?s c:ExcIEEEDC1A.uelin ?uelin. ?s c:ExcIEEEDC1A.vrmax ?vrmax. ?s c:ExcIEEEDC1A.vrmin ?vrmin. } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: A static exciter. DEPRECATED.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?efdmax ?efdmin ?emax ?emin ?k ?kc ?tatb ?tb ?tc ?te ?mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s r:type c:ExcSEXS. ?s c:ExcitationSystemDynamics.SynchronousMachineDynamics ?dyn. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineDynamics.SynchronousMachine ?eq. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID. ?s r:type c:ExcSEXS. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:ExcSEXS.efdmax ?efdmax. ?s c:ExcSEXS.efdmin ?efdmin. ?s c:ExcSEXS.emax ?emax. ?s c:ExcSEXS.emin ?emin. ?s c:ExcSEXS.k ?k. ?s c:ExcSEXS.kc ?kc. ?s c:ExcSEXS.tatb ?tatb. ?s c:ExcSEXS.tb ?tb. ?s c:ExcSEXS.tc ?tc. ?s c:ExcSEXS.te ?te. } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: A gas turbine governor. DEPRECATED.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?at ?dturb ?kt ?mwbase ?r ?t1 ?t2 ?t3 ?vmax ?vmin ?mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s r:type c:GovGAST. ?s c:TurbineGovernorDynamics.SynchronousMachineDynamics ?dyn. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineDynamics.SynchronousMachine ?eq. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID. ?s r:type c:GovGAST. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:GovGAST.at ?at. ?s c:GovGAST.dturb ?dturb. ?s c:GovGAST.kt ?kt. ?s c:GovGAST.mwbase ?mwbase. ?s c:GovGAST.r ?r. ?s c:GovGAST.t1 ?t1. ?s c:GovGAST.t2 ?t2. ?s c:GovGAST.t3 ?t3. ?s c:GovGAST.vmax ?vmax. ?s c:GovGAST.vmin ?vmin. } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: A hydro governor. DEPRECATED.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?at ?dturb ?gmax ?gmin ?hdam ?mwbase ?qnl ?rperm ?rtemp ?tf ?tg ?tr ?tw ?velm ?mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s r:type c:GovHydro1. ?s c:TurbineGovernorDynamics.SynchronousMachineDynamics ?dyn. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineDynamics.SynchronousMachine ?eq. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID. ?s r:type c:GovHydro1. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:GovHydro1.at ?at. ?s c:GovHydro1.dturb ?dturb. ?s c:GovHydro1.gmax ?gmax. ?s c:GovHydro1.gmin ?gmin. ?s c:GovHydro1.hdam ?hdam. ?s c:GovHydro1.mwbase ?mwbase. ?s c:GovHydro1.qnl ?qnl. ?s c:GovHydro1.rperm ?rperm. ?s c:GovHydro1.rtemp ?rtemp. ?s c:GovHydro1.tf ?tf. ?s c:GovHydro1.tg ?tg. ?s c:GovHydro1.tr ?tr. ?s c:GovHydro1.tw ?tw. ?s c:GovHydro1.velm ?velm. } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: A steam unit governor. DEPRECATED.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?dt ?mwbase ?r ?t1 ?t2 ?t3 ?vmax ?vmin ?mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s r:type c:GovSteam0. ?s c:TurbineGovernorDynamics.SynchronousMachineDynamics ?dyn. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineDynamics.SynchronousMachine ?eq. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID. ?s r:type c:GovSteam0. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:GovSteam0.dt ?dt. ?s c:GovSteam0.mwbase ?mwbase. ?s c:GovSteam0.r ?r. ?s c:GovSteam0.t1 ?t1. ?s c:GovSteam0.t2 ?t2. ?s c:GovSteam0.t3 ?t3. ?s c:GovSteam0.vmax ?vmax. ?s c:GovSteam0.vmin ?vmin. } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: A power system stabilizer. DEPRECATED.
query.value: SELECT ?name ?a1 ?a2 ?a3 ?a4 ?a5 ?a6 ?a7 ?a8 ?inputSignalType ?kd ?ks ?t1 ?t2 ?t3 ?t4 ?t5 ?t6 ?tdelay ?vcl ?vcu ?vrmax ?vrmin ?mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s r:type c:Pss1A. ?s c:PowerSystemStabilizerDynamics.ExcitationSystemDynamics ?exc. ?exc c:ExcitationSystemDynamics.SynchronousMachineDynamics ?dyn. ?dyn c:SynchronousMachineDynamics.SynchronousMachine ?eq. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?SynchronousMachine_mRID. ?s r:type c:Pss1A. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:Pss1A.a1 ?a1. ?s c:Pss1A.a2 ?a2. ?s c:Pss1A.a3 ?a3. ?s c:Pss1A.a4 ?a4. ?s c:Pss1A.a5 ?a5. ?s c:Pss1A.a6 ?a6. ?s c:Pss1A.a7 ?a7. ?s c:Pss1A.a8 ?a8. {?s c:Pss1A.inputSignalType ?rawtype. bind(strafter(str(?rawtype),"InputSignalKind.") as ?inputSignalType)} ?s c:Pss1A.kd ?kd. ?s c:Pss1A.ks ?ks. ?s c:Pss1A.t1 ?t1. ?s c:Pss1A.t2 ?t2. ?s c:Pss1A.t3 ?t3. ?s c:Pss1A.t4 ?t4. ?s c:Pss1A.t5 ?t5. ?s c:Pss1A.t6 ?t6. ?s c:Pss1A.tdelay ?tdelay. ?s c:Pss1A.vcl ?vcl. ?s c:Pss1A.vcu ?vcu. ?s c:Pss1A.vrmax ?vrmax. ?s c:Pss1A.vrmin ?vrmin. } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: List the values and sizes of parameters for the DLL interfaces. May return multiple rows for the same DLL *mRID*.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?mRID ?dllSequenceNumber ?dllParameterKind ?value WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?eq r:type c:PowerElectronicsConnection. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?d c:DetailedModelDynamics.Equipment ?eq. ?d c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?p e:IEEECigreDLLParameter.IEEECigreDLL ?d. ?p e:IEEECigreDLLParameter.dllSequenceNumber ?dllSequenceNumber. ?p e:IEEECigreDLLParameter.value ?value. {?p e:IEEECigreDLLParameter.dllParameterKind ?rawkind. bind(strafter(str(?rawkind),"Kind.") as ?dllParameterKind)} } ORDER by ?mRID ?dllSequenceNumber

query.description: Counts the number of parameters in each DLL interface.
query.value: # EMTCountDLLParameters SELECT ?mRID (count(?p) as ?count) WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?eq r:type c:PowerElectronicsConnection. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?d c:DetailedModelDynamics.Equipment ?eq. ?d c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?p e:IEEECigreDLLParameter.IEEECigreDLL ?d. } GROUP BY ?mRID ORDER BY ?mRID

query.description: List the metadata of input signals for the DLL interfaces. May return multiple rows for the same DLL *mRID*.
Counts the number of input signals in each DLL interface.
query.value: # EMTCountDLLInputs SELECT ?mRID (count(?p) as ?count) WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?eq r:type c:PowerElectronicsConnection. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?d c:DetailedModelDynamics.Equipment ?eq. ?d c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?p c:SignalDescriptor.DynamicsFunctionBlock ?d. ?p r:type e:IEEECigreDLLInput } GROUP BY ?mRID ORDER BY ?mRID

query.description: List the metadata of output signals for the DLL interfaces. May return multiple rows for the same DLL *mRID*.
Counts the number of output signals in each DLL interface.
query.value: SELECT ?mRID (count(?p) as ?count) WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?eq r:type c:PowerElectronicsConnection. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?d c:DetailedModelDynamics.Equipment ?eq. ?d c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?p c:SignalDescriptor.DynamicsFunctionBlock ?d. ?p r:type e:IEEECigreDLLOutput } GROUP BY ?mRID ORDER BY ?mRID

query.description: DLL interface attached to an inverter.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?mRID ?name ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID ?uri ?snapshotUri ?shareable ?dllDLLInterfaceVersion ?dllEmtRmsMode ?dllFixedStepBaseSampleTime ?dllModelName ?dllModelVersion WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?eq r:type c:PowerElectronicsConnection. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?d c:DetailedModelDynamics.Equipment ?eq. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID. ?d c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?d c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?d e:IEEECigreDLL.uri ?uri. ?d e:IEEECigreDLL.snapshotUri ?snapshotUri. ?d e:IEEECigreDLL.shareable ?shareable. ?d e:IEEECigreDLL.dllDLLInterfaceVersion ?dllDLLInterfaceVersion. {?d e:IEEECigreDLL.dllEmtRmsMode ?rawMode. bind(strafter(str(?rawMode),"Kind.") as ?dllEmtRmsMode)} ?d e:IEEECigreDLL.dllFixedStepBaseSampleTime ?dllFixedStepBaseSampleTime. ?d e:IEEECigreDLL.dllModelName ?dllModelName. ?d e:IEEECigreDLL.dllModelVersion ?dllModelVersion. } ORDER by ?mRID

query.description: IBR plant attributes, keyed on the inverter ID for convenience.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?mRID ?name ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID ?switchingFrequency ?dcLinkVoltage ?IEEECigreDLL_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?p r:type e:IBRPlant. ?p c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?p c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?p e:ConnectedFacility.Equipments ?eq. ?eq r:type c:PowerElectronicsConnection. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID. ?p e:IBRPlant.switchingFrequency ?switchingFrequency. ?p e:IBRPlant.dcLinkVoltage ?dcLinkVoltage. OPTIONAL { ?d c:DetailedModelDynamics.Equipment ?eq. ?d c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?IEEECigreDLL_mRID } } ORDER by ?mRID

query.description: A controller for machines or power electronics.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?mRID ?name ?modelKind ?Equipment_type ?Equipment_name ?Equipment_mRID ?DetailedModelTypeDynamics_name ?DetailedModelTypeDynamics_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?dyn c:DetailedModelDynamics.Equipment ?eq. ?dyn c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?dyn c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?Equipment_mRID. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.name ?Equipment_name. ?eq r:type ?typeraw. bind(strafter(str(?typeraw),"#") as ?Equipment_type) ?dyn c:DetailedModelDynamics.DetailedModelTypeDynamics ?typ. ?typ e:NthAmDynamicModel.modelKind ?modelKindRaw. bind(strafter(str(?modelKindRaw),"NthAmModelKind.") as ?modelKind) ?typ c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?DetailedModelTypeDynamics_mRID. ?typ c:IdentifiedObject.name ?DetailedModelTypeDynamics_name } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: A type of controller defined from proprietary file formats.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?mRID ?name ?modelKind ?nameKind ?statusKind ?closestStandardModel WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?dyn c:DetailedModelDynamics.Equipment ?eq. ?dyn c:DetailedModelDynamics.DetailedModelTypeDynamics ?typ. ?typ e:NthAmDynamicModel.modelKind ?modelKindRaw. ?typ e:NthAmDynamicModel.nameKind ?nameKindRaw. ?typ e:NthAmDynamicModel.statusKind ?statusKindRaw. bind(strafter(str(?modelKindRaw),"NthAmModelKind.") as ?modelKind) bind(strafter(str(?nameKindRaw),"NthAmModelNameKind.") as ?nameKind) bind(strafter(str(?statusKindRaw),"NthAmModelStatusKind.") as ?statusKind) ?typ e:NthAmDynamicModel.closestStandardModel ?closestStandardModel. ?typ c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?typ c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name } ORDER BY ?name

query.description: Describes the name and other metadata for a dynamics parameter.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?DetailedModelTypeDynamics_name ?sequenceNumber ?name ?mRID ?typicalValue ?engineeringUnit ?DetailedModelTypeDynamics_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?dyn c:DetailedModelDynamics.Equipment ?eq. ?dyn c:DetailedModelDynamics.DetailedModelTypeDynamics ?typ. ?prm c:DetailedModelDescriptor.DetailedModelTypeDynamics ?typ. ?prm c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?prm c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?prm c:ParameterDescriptor.sequenceNumber ?sequenceNumber. ?prm c:ParameterDescriptor.typicalValue ?typicalValue. ?prm c:ParameterDescriptor.engineeringUnit ?engineeringUnit. ?typ c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?DetailedModelTypeDynamics_mRID. ?typ c:IdentifiedObject.name ?DetailedModelTypeDynamics_name } ORDER BY ?DetailedModelTypeDynamics_name ?sequenceNumber

query.description: Parameter value for a controller instance.
query.value: SELECT ?Equipment_name ?Equipment_type ?DetailedModelTypeDynamics_name ?sequenceNumber ?name ?value ?ParameterDescriptor_mRID ?Equipment_mRID ?DetailedModelTypeDynamics_mRID WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?Equipment_mRID. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.name ?Equipment_name. ?eq r:type ?typeraw. bind(strafter(str(?typeraw),"#") as ?Equipment_type) ?dyn c:DetailedModelDynamics.Equipment ?eq. ?dyn c:DetailedModelDynamics.DetailedModelTypeDynamics ?typ. ?val c:ParameterValue.DetailedModelDynamics ?dyn. ?prm c:DetailedModelDescriptor.DetailedModelTypeDynamics ?typ. ?prm c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?ParameterDescriptor_mRID. ?prm c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?prm c:ParameterDescriptor.sequenceNumber ?sequenceNumber. ?val c:ParameterValue.ParameterDescriptor ?prm. ?val c:ParameterValue.value ?value. ?typ c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?DetailedModelTypeDynamics_mRID. ?typ c:IdentifiedObject.name ?DetailedModelTypeDynamics_name } ORDER BY ?Equipment_name ?DetailedModelTypeDynamics_name ?sequenceNumber

query.description: An equipment container represents the whole transmission system.
A container just for the DC nodes in the transmission system.
DC buses.
DC shunt capacitors and resistive loads.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?name ?mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID ?resistance ?capacitance ?ratedUdc ?DCNode1_mRID WHERE { ?s r:type c:DCShunt. ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?s c:DCShunt.resistance ?resistance. ?s c:DCShunt.capacitance ?capacitance. ?s c:DCConductingEquipment.ratedUdc ?ratedUdc. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?t1 c:DCTerminal.DCConductingEquipment ?s. ?t1 c:DCBaseTerminal.DCNode ?dcn1. ?t1 c:ACDCTerminal.sequenceNumber "1"^^c:Integer. ?dcn1 c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?DCNode1_mRID } ORDER by ?name

query.description: Solar panels, batteries, and other DC sources that don't rely on primary AC power.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?name ?mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID ?ratedUdc ?kind ?DCNode1_mRID WHERE { ?s r:type e:DCEnergySource. ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?s c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?s c:DCConductingEquipment.ratedUdc ?ratedUdc. ?s e:DCEnergySource.kind ?kindraw. bind(strafter(str(?kindraw),"DCSourceKind.") as ?kind) ?s c:IdentifiedObject.name ?name. ?s c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?t1 c:DCTerminal.DCConductingEquipment ?s. ?t1 c:DCBaseTerminal.DCNode ?dcn1. ?t1 c:ACDCTerminal.sequenceNumber "1"^^c:Integer. ?dcn1 c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?DCNode1_mRID } ORDER by ?name

query.description: Supplemental information from the DLL API about an IEEE/Cigre DLL interface.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?mRID ?dllGeneralInformation ?dllModelCreated ?dllModelCreator ?dllModelDescription ?dllModelLastModifiedBy ?dllModelLastModifiedDate ?dllModelModifiedComment ?dllModelModifiedHistory ?dllNumDoubleStates ?dllNumFloatStates ?dllNumIntStates ?dllNumInputPorts ?dllNumOutputPorts ?dllNumParameters WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?eq r:type c:PowerElectronicsConnection. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?d c:DetailedModelDynamics.Equipment ?eq. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID. ?d c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?d e:IEEECigreDLL.IEEECigreDLLInfo ?i. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLInfo.dllGeneralInformation ?dllGeneralInformation. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLInfo.dllModelCreated ?dllModelCreated. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLInfo.dllModelCreator ?dllModelCreator. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLInfo.dllModelDescription ?dllModelDescription. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLInfo.dllModelLastModifiedBy ?dllModelLastModifiedBy. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLInfo.dllModelLastModifiedDate ?dllModelLastModifiedDate. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLInfo.dllModelModifiedComment ?dllModelModifiedComment. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLInfo.dllModelModifiedHistory ?dllModelModifiedHistory. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLInfo.dllNumDoubleStates ?dllNumDoubleStates. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLInfo.dllNumFloatStates ?dllNumFloatStates. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLInfo.dllNumIntStates ?dllNumIntStates. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLInfo.dllNumInputPorts ?dllNumInputPorts. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLInfo.dllNumOutputPorts ?dllNumOutputPorts. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLInfo.dllNumParameters ?dllNumParameters } ORDER by ?mRID

query.description: Supplemental information from the DLL API about an IEEE/Cigre DLL interfaces parameters. May return multiple rows for the same DLL *mRID*.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?mRID ?dllSequenceNumber ?dllDefaultValue ?dllDescription ?dllFixedValue ?dllGroupName ?dllMaxValue ?dllMinValue ?dllName ?dllUnit WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?eq r:type c:PowerElectronicsConnection. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?d c:DetailedModelDynamics.Equipment ?eq. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID. ?d c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?p e:IEEECigreDLLParameter.IEEECigreDLL ?d. ?p e:IEEECigreDLLParameter.dllSequenceNumber ?dllSequenceNumber. ?p e:IEEECigreDLLParameter.IEEECigreDLLParameterInfo ?i. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLParameterInfo.dllDefaultValue ?dllDefaultValue. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLParameterInfo.dllMinValue ?dllMinValue. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLParameterInfo.dllMaxValue ?dllMaxValue. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLParameterInfo.dllFixedValue ?dllFixedValue. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLParameterInfo.dllName ?dllName. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLParameterInfo.dllUnit ?dllUnit. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLParameterInfo.dllGroupName ?dllGroupName. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLParameterInfo.dllDescription ?dllDescription } ORDER by ?mRID ?dllSequenceNumber

query.description: Supplemental information from the DLL API about an IEEE/Cigre DLL interface's input ports (signals). May return multiple rows for the same DLL *mRID*.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?mRID ?dllSequenceNumber ?dllDescription ?dllUnit WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?eq r:type c:PowerElectronicsConnection. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?d c:DetailedModelDynamics.Equipment ?eq. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID. ?d c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:SignalDescriptor.DynamicsFunctionBlock ?d. ?s e:IEEECigreDLLSignal.dllSequenceNumber ?dllSequenceNumber. ?s e:IEEECigreDLLSignal.IEEECigreDLLSignalInfo ?i. ?s e:IEEECigreDLLInput.kind ?k. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLSignalInfo.dllUnit ?dllUnit. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLSignalInfo.dllDescription ?dllDescription } ORDER by ?mRID ?dllSequenceNumber

query.description: Supplemental information from the DLL API about an IEEE/Cigre DLL interface's output ports (signals). May return multiple rows for the same DLL *mRID*.
query.value: SELECT DISTINCT ?mRID ?dllSequenceNumber ?dllDescription ?dllUnit WHERE { ?sys c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?EquipmentContainer_mRID. ?eq r:type c:PowerElectronicsConnection. ?eq c:Equipment.EquipmentContainer ?sys. ?d c:DetailedModelDynamics.Equipment ?eq. ?eq c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?PowerElectronicsConnection_mRID. ?d c:IdentifiedObject.mRID ?mRID. ?s c:SignalDescriptor.DynamicsFunctionBlock ?d. ?s e:IEEECigreDLLSignal.dllSequenceNumber ?dllSequenceNumber. ?s e:IEEECigreDLLSignal.IEEECigreDLLSignalInfo ?i. ?s e:IEEECigreDLLOutput.kind ?k. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLSignalInfo.dllUnit ?dllUnit. ?i e:IEEECigreDLLSignalInfo.dllDescription ?dllDescription } ORDER by ?mRID ?dllSequenceNumber
